# RevTurbine SDK Documentation

> Placement decisioning, entitlement checks, and usage tracking for web applications.

RevTurbine is the monetization engine for product-led SaaS. The SDK enables:
- **Placements** — show upgrade prompts, banners, modals, and toasts based on targeting rules
- **Entitlements** — gate features, enforce usage limits, track credits and seats
- **Events** — track user behavior, impressions, and conversions
- **Local runtime** — run the full decision engine client-side with no backend

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](/getting-started/quickstart/): Get your first placement rendering in under 5 minutes — no backend required.
- [Installation](/getting-started/installation/): Install the SDK via npm.
- [Authentication & Configuration](/getting-started/authentication/): API keys, environment variables, provider configuration, runtime modes.
- [React Integration](/getting-started/react/): RevTurbineProvider, hooks (usePlacement, useEntitlement, useUsageSnapshot, useRevTurbineTheme), and drop-in components.
- [Server-Side Integration](/getting-started/server-side/): Node.js server SDK, SSR patterns, server-side entitlement checks.

## Tutorials

- [Add an Upgrade Button](/tutorials/upgrade-button/): End-to-end — install, configure local mode, place a FixedSurfaceSlot button that renders based on targeting rules.
- [Gate a Premium Feature](/tutorials/gate-premium-feature/): Check entitlement, block access for free users, show an upgrade modal with AccessGateSurfaceSlot.
- [Track Usage and Show a Quota Meter](/tutorials/usage-quota-meter/): Report usage via updateUsage(), render a quota meter, trigger warning banners at thresholds.

## Guides

- [Runtime Modes](/guides/runtime-modes/): local_only (no backend), revturbine_server (production), custom_endpoints (your own API).
- [Entitlements](/guides/entitlements/): Feature gates, usage limits, credits, seats, capability tiers. checkEntitlement() and useEntitlement() patterns.
- [Placements](/guides/placements/): FixedSurfaceSlot, AccessGateSurfaceSlot, MessageSurfaceSlot. Placement output, lifecycle, caps, chaining.
- [Placement Cookbook](/guides/placement-cookbook/): Copy-paste patterns for banner, modal, toast, button, in-page, full-page, CLI, quota meter, credit balance.
- [Custom Slot Types](/guides/custom-slots/): PlacementTypeRegistry, PlacementSlotProps contract, custom component registration.
- [Theming](/guides/theming/): RevTurbineTheme — colors, typography, shape, shadows. Custom themes, useRevTurbineTheme() hook.
- [Events & Analytics](/guides/events/): trackEvent(), emitTrigger(), trackTreatmentInteraction(). Automatic impression tracking. Trigger events for targeting rules.
- [Error Handling](/guides/error-handling/): Fail-open semantics, providerFailureSlotBehavior, reason codes, retry patterns, graceful degradation.
- [Testing](/guides/testing/): Unit tests with mock providers, integration tests with local_only mode, Storybook visual testing, Playwright E2E.
- [Headless API](/guides/headless-api/): PlacementController, EntitlementGate, SdkSession — imperative SDK usage without React components.
- [Troubleshooting](/guides/troubleshooting/): Common issues and debugging.

## Concepts

- [Architecture](/concepts/architecture/): SDK architecture overview.
- [Integration Points](/concepts/integration-points/): Where the SDK integrates with your application.
- [Decision Engine](/concepts/decision-engine/): Targeting rules, segment evaluation, content resolution, token expansion, caching.
- [Provider Architecture](/concepts/providers/): Provider chain, built-in providers (server, local, custom), domain providers, failure cascade.
- [Data Flow](/concepts/data-flow/): ExportedConfig structure, user context merging, decision state lifecycle, localStorage persistence.

## Reference

- [Configuration](/reference/configuration/): Full RevTurbineInitOptions specification — all fields, types, defaults, mode-specific requirements.
- [Error Codes](/reference/errors/): Enumerated error and reason codes with causes and fixes.
- [Compatibility Matrix](/reference/compatibility/): Browser, runtime, React, TypeScript, and build tool compatibility. Feature support by mode.
- [Changelog](/reference/changelog/): Version history, breaking changes, migration notes.
- [API Reference](/api/): Auto-generated TypeDoc reference for all SDK exports.

## Interactive Playground

- [Playground Overview](/playground/): Live editable Sandpack scenarios running in local_only mode.
- Fixed Slots: [Upgrade Button](/playground/fixed-slots/fixed-button/), [Plans & Pricing](/playground/fixed-slots/fixed-in-page/), [Quota Meter](/playground/fixed-slots/fixed-usage-counter/), [Annual Banner](/playground/fixed-slots/fixed-banner/)
- Access Gates: [Video Export Gate](/playground/access-gates/gate-modal/), [Watermark Gate](/playground/access-gates/gate-inline/), [Brand Kit Gate](/playground/access-gates/gate-card/)
- Global Slots: [Usage Warning](/playground/global-slots/msg-banner/), [Usage Exhausted](/playground/global-slots/msg-modal/), [Trial Toast](/playground/global-slots/msg-toast/)
- Headless: [PlacementController](/playground/headless/headless-placement/), [EntitlementGate](/playground/headless/headless-gate/), [SdkSession](/playground/headless/headless-session/)

## Key Types

- `RevTurbineProvider` — React context provider. Props: options (RevTurbineInitOptions), bootstrapPlacements, children.
- `RevTurbineInitOptions` — tenantId, apiKey, endpoint, mode ('react'|'snippet'|'iframe'), runtimeMode ('revturbine_server'|'local_only'|'custom_endpoints'), localRuntime, providerFailureSlotBehavior, uiPathResolvers, contextPolicy, persistentStorage.
- `usePlacement(options)` — Returns: isLoading, error, visible, decision, content, refresh, dismiss, snooze, ctaClick, ctaComplete.
- `useEntitlement({ handle, autoGate? })` — Returns: isLoading, error, allowed, limited, denied, gatedPlacement, recheck.
- `useUsageSnapshot()` — Returns: usage (Record<string, { current, limit? }>), refresh.
- `useRevTurbineTheme()` — Returns: RevTurbineTheme (colors, typography, shape, shadows).
- `FixedSurfaceSlot` — Always-visible inline slot. Props: id, surfaceTemplateIds.
- `AccessGateSurfaceSlot` — Entitlement gate slot. Props: id, surfaceTemplateIds, entitlementHandle, children.
- `MessageSurfaceSlot` — Triggered slot (toast/modal/banner). Props: id, surfaceTemplateIds.
- `PlacementOutput` — output_id, decision_id, surface_type, template_id, content, ui_path, promotion, reason_codes, cap_policies.
- `EntitlementResult` — status ('allowed'|'limited'|'denied'), allowed, reason, usage, requiredTier.
- `ExportedConfig` — plans, entitlements, placements, surface_templates, targeting_rules, segments, theme, config_version.
